title: Fishing Timer Pack Template
description: A template pack for fishing timer module of rhizome mod
body:
A template pack for fishing timer module of rhizome mod
### Texture Usage
The textures part contains a png file with width of 128px and unit height of 32px.There are 12 rows of textures, the fist one on top is after-cast and then 10-1, the last one at bottom is on-bite
### Sound Usage
Same as textures, there are 12 ogg sound files, the one ends with 11 is after-cast and then 10-1, the last one ends with 0 is on-bite
